thread.text:
Hello Dr. Pendragon, 
I hope you're doing well! I'm Yvain from BUSECON 318. Because of the accident on State Street, I entered class on Wednesday about half an hour late. I know it's a lot to ask, but could I have information about the extra credit presentation assignment? I'll make sure I complete it on time and to the best of my ability. 
Thank you, 
Yvain

Hello Yvain, 
Thank you for reaching out. Due to extenuating circumstances, I'll give you the information. Note that this is a one-time permittance and I expect you to be on time in the future. 
Arthur

Hello Dr. Pendragon, 
Thank you so much! I won't let you down. 
Yvain

Hi Dr. Pendragon, 
Hi, I'm Gawain. I was late to class yesterday since the huge traffic blockup between campuses stopped all the buses. You gave extra credit options to the rest of the class earlier but I missed out- could you give me them just a little late? I know you said they were only for students who came on time, but I really need the grade boost since I lowkey failed the last exam. 
Epic name btw! 
Thanks a lot, 
Gawain

Hello Gawain, 
Of course. Thank you for reaching out. See here for instructions. 
Best, 
Arthur
Hi uncle, could I have the EC info doc? Thanks.

Dear Professor, 
 My name is Lanval. I am a student in your BUSECON 318 class. I was unable to arrive to this class on time yesterday due to the traffic incident on S. State St., which delayed university bus routes 4 and 23 from approximately 3:33 PM to 4:12 PM (see University News article linked here). I entered class exactly 24 minutes late, and in doing so missed the instructions relating to the Presentation Extra Credit option. 
I am aware that all students not present at the beginning of the class were to be denied the opportunity to participate in the extra credit opportunity, as you rightfully prioritize punctuality and dedication within your classroom environment and within the university as a whole. However, as my tardiness was completely out of my control, I would like to tentatively request that this requirement be waived in this case. If not, I completely understand. If there is anything else I can do to gain access to the extra credit opportunity, please let me know; I would be glad to do it. 
I truly appreciate your time and consideration. 
Best, 
Lanval

Dear Professor, 
I trust you are well. I understand that you have a very busy schedule; however, I would like to follow up with you on the above. 
Best, 
Lanval

Dear Professor Pendragon, 
Hello Professor- I understand that the extra credit deadline is tomorrow and I have not yet received a response from you. Is there anything I can do to help you send the relevant information my way? As I mentioned before, if you cannot give me this information, I understand. 
Best, 
Lanval

Hey! Sorry about my late response, Lanval, it seems like I forgot to reply to you! Unfortunately, the extra credit deadline has passed. Instead, I advise you to study hard for the final; I'm sure you won't need the extra credit!
Arthur

Dear Professor, 
I see. Thank you. 
Sincerely, 
Lanval

messages.text: Um. I don't know if you were serious yesterday.
But if you were, do you want to come over? I'm in Pentecost Apartments, room 13. I'm free after 6.
Do you want to get dinner with me? Don't worry, I'll get takeout. I remember your rules.
is that the teacher's pet lol? i didn't think he'd be caught dead at a party like this
kay we were in a group project with him remember? we made a group chat. i think he lives in our apartment too
oh was he the guy that literally always texted with perfect grammar LMAO
at a party. boring as hell
kay is throwing up in the corner. everyone's drinking. i think gawain tried to take a picture of me just now
back home nobody was like this i swear
i don't know if it's this college or this country or what but everything's just so- different here. everything's so hard
i can't be with you here
can't be with you anywhere. god this is hard
wouldn't trade it for anything though
I'm going back to the apartment
LMAOOOOOO KAY YOU THREW UP SO HARD
wait wait where'd the teacher's pet go

thread.text: There's a prospective grad student mixer next week [calendar invite attached]. I'm a speaker. I'd love to see you there <3
Uh, I'm not a grad student. But thank you very much for the invitation, Mrs. Pendragon.
Guinevere, please. And all students are invited, undergraduates included!
We'd love to have you, Lanval.
